mapper.sql: id, emp_id, emp_name, emp_type, dorm_id, dorm_name, room_id, room_name, check_in_date, check_out_date, status, reason
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM occupancy_record
ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT id, emp_id, emp_name, emp_type, dorm_id, dorm_name, room_id, room_name, check_in_date, check_out_date, status, reason, is_deleted, create_time, update_time FROM occupancy_record WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO occupancy_record ( emp_id, emp_name, emp_type, dorm_id, dorm_name, room_id, room_name, check_in_date, check_out_date, status, reason, is_deleted, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{empId}, #{empName}, #{empType}, #{dormId}, #{dormName}, #{roomId}, #{roomName}, #{checkInDate}, NULL, 'active', NULL, 0, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE occupancy_record SET status = 'checked_out', check_out_date = #{dto.checkOutDate}, reason = #{dto.reason}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT FROM occupancy_record WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT id, emp_id, emp_name, emp_type, dorm_id, dorm_name, room_id, room_name, check_in_date, check_out_date, status, reason FROM occupancy_record WHERE status = 'active' AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT o.emp_name AS name, o.dorm_name AS dormName, o.room_name AS roomName, TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, o.check_in_date, CURDATE()) AS years, COALESCE(e.division, e.origin) AS dept FROM occupancy_record o LEFT JOIN employee_info e ON e.id = o.emp_id AND e.is_deleted = 0 WHERE o.status = 'active' AND o.is_deleted = 0 AND DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), o.check_in_date) > (5 * 365) ORDER BY o.check_in_date ASC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(m.month_end, '%Y/%m') AS month, ROUND( IFNULL(COUNT(o.id), 0) * 100.0 / NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(id) FROM room_info WHERE is_deleted = 0), 0) ) AS rate FROM ( SELECT LAST_DAY(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL n MONTH)) AS month_end FROM ( SELECT 0 AS n UNION ALL SELECT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5 ) nums WHERE n < #{months} ) m LEFT JOIN occupancy_record o ON o.is_deleted = 0 AND o.check_in_date <= m.month_end AND (o.check_out_date IS NULL OR o.check_out_date > m.month_end) GROUP BY m.month_end ORDER BY m.month_end ASC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(month_date, '%Y/%m') AS month, SUM(check_in_count) AS checkIn, SUM(check_out_count) AS checkOut FROM ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(check_in_date, '%Y-%m-01') AS month_date, COUNT(id) AS check_in_count, 0 AS check_out_count FROM occupancy_record WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND check_in_date >= DATE_SUB(DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-01'), INTERVAL #{months} MONTH) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(check_in_date, '%Y-%m-01') UNION ALL SELECT DATE_FORMAT(check_out_date, '%Y-%m-01') AS month_date, 0 AS check_in_count, COUNT(id) AS check_out_count FROM occupancy_record WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND status = 'checked_out' AND check_out_date >= DATE_SUB(DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-01'), INTERVAL #{months} MONTH) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(check_out_date, '%Y-%m-01') ) t GROUP BY month_date ORDER BY month_date ASC
